levels.name: static_structure
levels.goal_zh: 检查结构、schema、路径、引用和节点长度。
levels.goal_en: Check structure, schemas, paths, references, and node length.

levels.name: contract
levels.goal_zh: 验证输入、输出、工具参数、错误路径和文件边界。
levels.goal_en: Validate inputs, outputs, tool arguments, error paths, and file boundaries.

levels.name: component
levels.goal_zh: 测试触发、单步路由、模板、脚本和局部 fixture。
levels.goal_en: Test activation, single-step routing, templates, scripts, and local fixtures.

levels.name: trajectory
levels.goal_zh: 评估工具调用序列、参数、加载文档、状态变化和失败处理。
levels.goal_en: Evaluate tool-call sequence, arguments, loaded docs, state changes, and failure handling.

levels.name: real_task
levels.goal_zh: 在固定任务、固定环境和稳定 fixture 上验证端到端结果。
levels.goal_en: Validate end-to-end outcomes on fixed tasks, fixed environments, and stable fixtures.

levels.name: paired_eval
levels.goal_zh: 隔离 skill 的边际收益和成本变化。
levels.goal_en: Isolate the skill's marginal lift and cost delta.

levels.name: release_lifecycle
levels.goal_zh: 验证发布清单、门禁、回滚、弃用、注册表 metadata 和运行观测字段。
levels.goal_en: Validate release manifest, gates, rollback, deprecation, registry metadata, and runtime observability fields.
